Afi Armguards Alpha.description: Flamefete Ticket armguards. They're imbued with blessed fire to be raised up in the midsummer heat, illuminating the people.

Ajarakan Vambraces.description: Mighty Ajarakan armguards. They have just as much ground-shaking power as their namesake.

Ajarakan Vambraces Alpha.description: Mighty Ajarakan armguards. They have just as much ground-shaking power as their namesake.

Ajarakan Vambraces Beta.description: Mighty Ajarakan armguards. They have just as much ground-shaking power as their namesake.

Alloy Vambraces.description: Armguards crafted from quality ore. Every element is streamlined for maximum utility.

Alloy Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards crafted from quality ore. Every element is streamlined for maximum utility.

Arkvulcan Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards made from Arkveld spoils. Legions a hundred thousand strong succumbed before the knight.

Arkvulcan Vambraces Beta.description: Armguards made from Arkveld spoils. Legions a hundred thousand strong succumbed before the knight.

Artian Vambraces Alpha.description: Arm guards made from eldritch scraps. Unlocking its potential took patience.

Balahara Vambraces.description: Balahara armguards. The spikes are arranged artfully in a way that maximizes movement.

Balahara Vambraces Alpha.description: Balahara armguards. The spikes are arranged artfully in a way that maximizes movement.

Balahara Vambraces Beta.description: Balahara armguards. The spikes are arranged artfully in a way that maximizes movement.

Bale Gauntlets Alpha.description: Armguards worn by a dark knight. Shadowy proof of those who seek justice at all costs.

Barina Vambraces.description: Lala Barina armguards that are so elegant they could pass as formal wear.

Barina Vambraces Alpha.description: Lala Barina armguards that are so elegant they could pass as formal wear.

Barina Vambraces Beta.description: Lala Barina armguards that are so elegant they could pass as formal wear.

Battle Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards designed for seasoned hunters. Highly utile, with extra consideration given to mobility.

Blango Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards made from Blangonga parts. The tough pelt is woven with gentle, inspiring elegance.

Blango Vambraces Beta.description: Armguards made from Blangonga parts. The tough pelt is woven with gentle, inspiring elegance.

Blossom Cuffs Alpha.description: Blossom Ticket armguards. A flower-inspired design to add some elegance and cheer.

Bone Vambraces.description: Traditional armguards made from monster bones. It's a wonder these mismatched shapes fit together.

Bone Vambraces Alpha.description: Traditional armguards made from monster bones. It's a wonder these mismatched shapes fit together.

Butterfly Brachia Alpha.description: Dazzling armor made from insect parts. The gorgeous material has a lovely silky feel to it.

Ceremonial Vambraces Alpha.description: Lumenhymn Ticket armguards. Its fingers greet the splendor of winter with affection and gratitude.

Chainmail Gloves.description: Armguards made of woven chain links. They're easy to use and a breeze to maintain.

Chainmail Gloves Alpha.description: Armguards made of woven chain links. They're easy to use and a breeze to maintain.

Chatacabra Vambraces.description: Chatacabra armguards. They protect the wrists without hampering weapon handling.

Chatacabra Vambraces Alpha.description: Chatacabra armguards. They protect the wrists without hampering weapon handling.

Chatacabra Vambraces Beta.description: Chatacabra armguards. They protect the wrists without hampering weapon handling.

Clerk Vambraces Alpha.description: Grand Hub handler armguards. Their minimalist design is perfectly suited to clerical work.

Commission Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards worn by hunters on an expedition to the New World. Sturdily made.

Conga Vambraces.description: Armguards made from Congalala materials. Crudely made but highly protective.

Conga Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards made from Congalala materials. Crudely made but highly protective.

Conga Vambraces Beta.description: Armguards made from Congalala materials. Crudely made but highly protective.

Dahaad Shardbraces Alpha.description: Jin Dahaad armguards. Directly rejecting warmth, they freeze everything they touch.

Dahaad Shardbraces Beta.description: Jin Dahaad armguards. Directly rejecting warmth, they freeze everything they touch.

Dahaad Shardbraces Gamma.description: Armguards made from special Jin Dahaad materials. The shining white gauntlets evoke the ambition of the Arch-tempered.

Damascus Vambraces Alpha.description: Steel armor said to lead its wearer to glory. Once thought to be mythical.

Death Stench Grip Alpha.description: Armor drenched in the stench of decay and a sensation as if the god of death resides within.

Demon Arm Wraps Alpha.description: Arm wraps worn by a demon of combat that contain the malefic powers of the Satsui no Hado. (Full Armor Set)

Diver's Braces Alpha.description: Diving Ticket armguards. The device on the right arm is built to function under pressure— just like you.

Dober Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards made of unknown black bones, which surely belonged to a mighty beast.

Doshaguma Braces.description: Doshaguma armguards. Teeming with such feral power, they had to be restrained with metal bracers.

Guild Ace Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards worn by an Astrum Unit hunter. Primarily made of leather to make weapon handling a breeze.

Gypceros Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards made from Gypceros spoils. The springy nature of the material renders lesser attacks meaningless.

Harvest Trama Alpha.description: Harvest Ticket armguards. Pumpkins reinforced with a special potion house the spirits of the dead.

High Metal Braces Alpha.description: Armor made from a generous portion of ore. Ordinary attacks won't even scratch it!

Hirabami Vambraces.description: Armguards made from Hirabami spoils. Wind rises at the fingertips in warning to all adversaries.

Hope Vambraces.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. Pliant fingers help with precision work.

Hope Vambraces Alpha.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. Pliant fingers help with precision work.

Ingot Vambraces.description: Armguards fashioned from lustrous, golden ore. A union of artistry and utility with no absence of durability.

King Beetle Brachia Alpha.description: Armor to fulfill the ambitions of those who dreamed of wielding the power to rule over bug-kind.

Omega Vambraces Alpha.description: Armguards fashioned after the apex of autonomous weaponry. Analyze all possible threats.
